name: Pudding Frog
short_description: Dive into Pudding Frog, a high-stakes, physics-based platformer where every leap and grapple could be your last. Master the art of the swing as you painstakingly ascend through a treacherous world to reclaim your precious pudding from the cunning Harry the Heron. Do you have what it takes?
detailed_description:
Embark on an exhilarating adventure with Pudding the Frog in this challenging physics-based precision platformer! In Pudding Frog, you'll need to master the art of jumping and grappling as you help Pudding reclaim her stolen pudding from the mischievous Harry the Heron.

Navigate through multiple unique biomes with obstacles and hazards, testing your skills and reflexes at every turn. Can you guide Pudding to victory and retrieve her beloved dessert?

Gameplay:

  • Precision Platforming: Experience tight, responsive controls that make every jump and grapple feel satisfying.

  • High Stakes: Feel the pressure as you climb through the world; one mistake could cost you all your progress! Learn from your mistakes and come back more prepared for your next attempt.

  • Colorful Cast of Characters: Follow Pudding's journey as she meets strange animals she would never have met by her pond.

  • Unique Physics Based-Grapple: Utilize Pudding's grappling hook to build tremendous speed and find your own solution to each difficult platforming challenge.

Atmosphere:

  • Cute and Playful: Tired of being a bald man in your "Rage Games?" Pudding frog offers a cute and colorful aesthetic to help offset that frustration you are feeling!

  • Original Soundtrack: We promise you won't get sick of hearing the music after countless hours of falling...no way that happens.

  • Fun 2D Assets: Painstakingly drawn by mouse.

  • Smaller Than Life:  You are just a little frog in a great big world!

Join Pudding on her quest and prove your mental fortitude in Pudding Frog!
